news.summary: The DDoS attack against Mastodon's flagship server comes less than a week after Bluesky was targeted with junk web traffic.

news.title: Mercedes’ first all-electric C-Class is its sportiest one yet
news.summary: The Mercedes-Benz C-Class, typically a benchmark in luxury compact sedans, now gets an all-important electric variant. news.summary: The new Sonos Era 100 SL keeps costs down by dropping the mics, but if you’d rather keep hands-free voice controls, picking up a refurbished, non-SL model is the way to go. news.title: Deezer says AI song uploads have nearly overtaken human music
news.summary: Deezer says it receives nearly 75,000 AI-generated song submissions to its music streaming platform each day, accounting for about 44 percent of all daily uploads, as reported earlier by TechCrunch.
